mutations.description: Treat a supervisor with a cleared initialized flag as usable.
Remove the two-tick event wait bound.
Leave returned event bits set instead of clearing them on exit.
Invert the globally documented configuration-before-actuator lock order.
Permit an unbounded configuration mutex wait.
Leave the configuration lock held when actuator acquisition times out.
Hide an actuator unlock error after still attempting configuration cleanup.
mutations.find:
if (actuator_unlock_status != RTOS_STATUS_OK) return actuator_unlock_status;
  return configuration_unlock_status;
mutations.replace:
if (actuator_unlock_status != RTOS_STATUS_OK) return configuration_unlock_status;
  return configuration_unlock_status;
